title: Manolo Kabezabolo
overview: Documentary about Manuel Méndez, better known as Manolo Kabezabolo, a punk artist who in a somewhat implausible way has crossed time, space and fashions, without giving up his essences and principles.

trailers.title: "Manolo Kabezabolo: Cuatro Décadas de Autenticidad Punk"
